stemHtml:
As taken from the METAR excerpt: 22005KT 0400 R24/0650 FG NSC 03/03 Q1022=

What phenomenon can be expected?

options.a: Radiation fog with vertical extent up to 3 000 ft.
options.b: Radiation fog with vertical extent up to 300 ft.
options.c: Overcast sky with low stratus in 1 000 ft and more.
options.d: Low stratus from 400 ft to 650 ft.
